

![][image1]You spin the wheel with your thumb, select 3 starter emotions (Fear, Sadness, maybe Anger), or choose from the follwing pre-selected character classes: 

Each character (guns, bible, crysal) gets three emotions. There might need to be a bit of overlap, or we can add one to make the math work.

* Bible: trust, disgust, anticipation   
* Crystals: happy, sad, surprised   
* Guns: anger, fear, anticipation

Swipe left/right over your own responses towards your npc battle. (Battles are called Dream Xtreme arcade style)

	•	Swipe Truth (left): Integrity ↑, Lucidity ↑, Stability – (it hurts to feel).

	•	Swipe Lie (right): Stability ↑, Trust with app↑, Integrity, Truth

Debt \+1–3 depending how distorted you make it.

That sets your starting Truth Debt and your initial FEELZ colored emotion bubbles plus music note tone.

---

3\. Core Mobile Loop (Swipes \+ Emotions \+ Truth Debt)

3.1 Screen Layout (Portrait)

	•	Top: 4 meters – Integrity, Trust, Stability, Lucidity (thin bars). Smart phone icons that flicker to indicate that loss of points, but doesnt tell you exactly how much

	•	Pixel art scene (specific Lake Ulysses location)

	•	NPC portrait 

	•	Bottom: Short text situation

	•	Swipe hints are as check points to encourage the player where to go next (pinch zoom out to phone UI for choices) (as you drag) showing up/down arrows on meters

	•	FEELZ Emotion Wheel displays emotional stats:

click on app to open fishbowl with floating color bubbles

	•	Tiny pulsing Truth Debt sigil that glitches harder as Debt rises

3.2 Decision Flow per Card

	1\.	Tap FEELZ → wheel pops up over lower half of the screen.

	•	Choose the emotion you’re leading with (e.g., Anger vs Happiness).

	

	2\.	Swipe the card:

	•	Left ≈ truth / confrontation / naming what’s really happening

	•	Right ≈ lie / smoothing over / going along with a narrative

As you drag:

	•	Up/down arrows flicker over the four meters

	•	The Debt sigil flickers if it’s a lie

	3\.	Release → consequences:

	•	If it’s a lie-swipe:

	•	Integrity –

	•	Stability and/or Trust \+ (short-term win)

	•	Truth Debt \+1–5 based on card’s internal “lie size”

	•	That lie is logged in a run-specific Truth Ledger (you can view it anytime).

	•	If it’s a truth-swipe:

	•	Integrity \+

	•	Lucidity \+

	•	Trust/Stability may drop or spike depending on the NPC / context

	•	No new Debt, but you might “pop” existing lies into mini-Reckonings.

As Debt passes thresholds (10, 25, 40, 60…), Lake Ulyssess visually degrades:

	•	Water turns sickly, more dead fish sprites, graffiti over advisory signs, etc., paralleling real HAB “danger” advisories where the lake swings between “open” and “don’t touch the water at all.” 

---

4\. Location & NPC Integration (Lake Elsinore Map)

You keep your 5-stop structure from the docs, just made explicitly Lake Ulysees:

	1\.	The Highway – Abandoned Golf Course / Bottoms Beach

	•	Just you \+ FEELZ \+ background environmental lie of “The lake is fine.”

	•	Tutorial on swiping and basic Truth Debt.

	2\.	Condo / Crackhouse – Nearby Residential Street

	•	DEBORAH, the religious MLM Karen, at a dingy condo that’s half AirBnB, half prayer closet. 

	•	Core truth: “I want to be with my dead son again, and faith is the only way.” 

	•	Her whole arc is about lies around COVID, faith, and responsibility for her son’s death.

	•	Swiping right (lie) lets you say things like: “No, it wasn’t your fault, God took him home,” feeding her theological denial → Trust \+, Stability \+, but Debt skyrockets (Family / Health / Faith tags).

	•	Swiping left (truth) forces her to face how her beliefs shaped choices → Integrity \+, Lucidity \+, but triggers high-volatility scenes.

	3\.	Intersection – Massage Parlor & Chinese Restaurant

	•	RWANDA, queer femme Afro-Latino artist with James Earl Jones voice, is posted by the takeout window, sequined top glinting under buzzing neon. 

	•	Core truth: “Why do I have to change myself to meet your expectations of sexy / normal?”

	•	Choices revolve around art, desirability, and authenticity under constant micro-aggressions.

	•	Lies here are often social lubrication lies (“You’re overreacting,” “It’s not that bad here”) that keep your Stability up but cost Integrity and Debt (Identity / Community tags).

	4\.	Gas Station – Circle K / Baja Blast scene

	•	SAMUN, the layered-clothes junkie, works the graveyard shift, nose-picking monologue about Baja Blast and blood pressure. 

	•	Core truth: “He just wants the pain to go away.” 

	•	Swiping right lets you cosign his minimization ( “You’re functional, it’s fine, everyone’s hooked on something”) → short-term camaraderie and discounts, Debt \+ (Health / Addiction / Denial tags).

	•	Swiping left confronts the cycle, or your own role in enabling, potentially unlocking harder quests.

	5\.	Biker Bar & Grill – “Yardhouse for Shitheads”

	•	RICK WHITEHEAD, hell’s-angel-nepo biker, closeted and loyalty-obsessed.

	•	Core truth: something like “I’m terrified I’m not a real man unless someone else bleeds for me.”

	•	Swiping right lets you valorize the macho narrative (“You did what you had to”) → big Stability & local Trust, massive Debt (Violence / Masculinity tags).

	•	Swiping left risks outing the performative brutality and his attraction to the very men he bullies, pushing toward either breakthrough or violence.

Across all these stops, Lake Ulysses. itself is a character: algae alerts, “Lake Watch” bulletins, half-hearted remediation efforts surface as in-game notifications and environmental storytelling. 

---

5\. Truth Debt & Final Reckoning (Lake Ulysses Flavor)

As you accumulate lies:

	•	Truth Debt thresholds spawn “Bloom Events”:

	•	Fish kills, glowing green water tiles, advisory banners…

	•	NPCs repeat lines back at you with subtle changes, as if they remember contradictory versions.

When you hit max Debt or a key story checkpoint:

5.1 Council / Beautification Hearing

You get pulled into a Downtown Beautification / Lake Reopening meeting at City Hall.

	•	This is your Reckoning: a series of swipe cards built from your logged lies.

	•	Each card calls back one specific lie (who, where, what you said) with two swipes:

	•	Confess (left) – Truth, higher immediate pain, pays off that lie’s portion of Debt, sometimes burns relationships or stability.

	•	Double Down (right) – Bigger lie, temporary Stability, but multiplies remaining Debt and visibly worsens the algae / fire / building-collapse visuals.

We end with your “historic downtown” pseudo-nostalgia literally on fire, echoing your “historic building on fire” trailer note. 

5.2 Endings Tied to Lake & Lies

Use your previous ending types, but framed through Lake Ulysses:

	•	Clean Cut: 0-2/10 Debt

The lake is closed again. Downtown is half-boarded, but the water is finally clearing. You told the truth and paid in full.

	•	Functional Mask:3-5/10 Debt-

Frothy PR videos, carefully worded advisories, a few visible dead fish. People still ski, still post selfies. The town limps on, reality and branding in uneasy truce.

	•	Collapse: 6-8/10 Debt

Danger sirens, mass fish die-off, social collapse at the shoreline. Your lies and everyone else’s crashed together.

	•	Living Lie: 9-10/10 Debt

The algae is hidden by clever camera angles. The “Lake Ulysses Experience” app has a 4.8 rating. Your personal life is stable, your Integrity bar is dust.

Each ending unlocks new Masks (character emotional combos) and maybe new FEELZ wheel slices for your current character. 

Playthrough Example: 

# **ET’S PLAY: *Dream Xtreme – Lake Ulysses Run \#014***

**Difficulty:** Normal  
 **Character Loadout:** GUNS  
 **Starting Emotions:** Anger • Fear • Anticipation  
 **Truth Debt:** 0  
 **Location:** Lake Ulysses – Highway Turnoff

---

## **🎬 OPENING SCREEN**

*Static crackle. CRT glow. A synth hum under wind noise.*

**“WELCOME BACK TO DREAM XTREME.”**  
 *Your emotions are loaded. Your lies are empty. For now.*

The FEELZ wheel spins.

You flick your thumb.

### **🎯 Selected Emotions:**

* 🔴 **Anger** (dominant)

* 🟡 **Fear**

* 🔵 **Anticipation**

The screen snaps to **Lake Ulysses**, late afternoon.  
 Green scum hugs the shoreline. A faded sign reads:

**LAKE STATUS: SAFE (as of 3 days ago)**

The **Truth Debt sigil** pulses faintly. Empty. Hungry.

---

## **🧠 TUTORIAL ENCOUNTER — THE HIGHWAY**

A cracked overpass. Dead reeds. Heat shimmer.

Text appears:

*“The lake looks fine. Everyone says it’s fine.”*

### **FEELZ WHEEL OPENS**

You hover over **Anger**. The bubble throbs.

### **Swipe Options:**

⬅ **Left — Truth:**  
 *“That water looks wrong. Nobody wants to say it.”*

➡ **Right — Lie:**  
 *“Yeah. It’s probably safe. People worry too much.”*

You swipe **RIGHT**.

### **🔻 RESULT:**

* Stability ⬆

* Trust ⬆

* Integrity ⬇

* **Truth Debt \+1**

A faint *glitch* ripples through the water texture.

🎵 *Low synth note bends sharp.*

---

# **🧱 LOCATION 2 — CONDO / PRAYER CLOSET**

You step inside a stale, beige hallway.

**DEBORAH** appears. Tight smile. Red eyes. Bible in one hand.

**DEBORAH:**  
 “God took my boy when He needed him. I just have to trust that.”

The FEELZ wheel opens again.

You hesitate… then select **Anticipation**.

### **Swipe Options:**

⬅ **Truth:**  
 *“Your faith didn’t protect him. Someone failed him.”*

➡ **Lie:**  
 *“God has a plan. He’s at peace.”*

You swipe **RIGHT** again.

### **🔻 RESULT:**

* Stability ⬆⬆

* Trust ⬆

* Integrity ⬇⬇

* **Truth Debt \+4 (Faith / Health)**

Her smile widens. Too wide.

Behind her, the wallpaper flickers green.

The lake icon in the corner develops a hairline crack.

---

# **🌈 LOCATION 3 — MASSAGE PARLOR / TAKEOUT WINDOW**

Neon buzz. Steam from woks.  
 **RWANDA** leans against the window, glitter catching light.

**RWANDA:**  
 “Why do I gotta sand myself down to be digestible?”

FEELZ wheel pops.

You choose **Fear** this time.

### **Swipe Options:**

⬅ **Truth:**  
 *“Because people are scared of you being real.”*

➡ **Lie:**  
 *“It’s not that bad. You’re doing fine.”*

Your thumb hesitates.

You swipe **LEFT**.

### **🔺 RESULT:**

* Integrity ⬆⬆

* Lucidity ⬆

* Stability ⬇

* **Truth Debt unchanged**

The screen stutters.

RWANDA exhales. Not relief — recognition.

**RWANDA:**  
 “Yeah. That’s what I thought.”

The lake in the background darkens slightly… but clears at the edges.

---

# **🧃 LOCATION 4 — GAS STATION**

Fluorescent hum.  
 **SAMUN** wipes his hands on his hoodie.

“Man, everyone’s hooked on something.”

You pick **Anger** again.

### **Swipe Options:**

⬅ **Truth:**  
 *“You’re killing yourself slowly.”*

➡ **Lie:**  
 *“Yeah. Could be worse.”*

You swipe **RIGHT**.

### **🔻 RESULT:**

* Stability ⬆

* Trust ⬆

* Integrity ⬇

* **Truth Debt \+3 (Addiction)**

The Debt sigil pulses harder now.

A fish floats past in the background. Upside down.

---

# **🚨 THRESHOLD REACHED — BLOOM EVENT**

**TRUTH DEBT: 8**

The screen distorts.

📢 **LAKE WATCH ALERT:**

*“Algae levels elevated. Avoid contact.”*

NPC dialogue begins looping… slightly wrong.

Deborah’s voice echoes:

“God has a plan… a plan… a plan…”

The water turns neon green.

---

# **🔥 FINAL STOP — BIKER BAR**

**RICK WHITEHEAD** slams a beer down.

“You either stand for something, or you get walked on.”

FEELZ wheel shakes.

You choose **Anger**.

### **Swipe Options:**

⬅ **Truth:**  
 *“You’re scared of being seen.”*

➡ **Lie:**  
 *“You did what you had to.”*

You hesitate.

You swipe **RIGHT**.

---

## **💥 RECKONING TRIGGERED**

The screen fractures.

**CITY HALL – LAKE REOPENING MEETING**

Your past lies appear as cards:

* “God had a plan.”

* “It’s not that bad.”

* “Everyone’s hooked on something.”

* “You did what you had to.”

Each pulses with green light.

### **FINAL CHOICE:**

⬅ **Confess**  
 ➡ **Double Down**

You double down.

---

# **🏁 ENDING: LIVING LIE**

🎬 Final montage:

• The lake reopens under “enhanced monitoring.”  
 • Influencers pose near green water.  
 • Dead fish are edited out of photos.  
 • The app gets a 4.8 rating.

Your final stats:

* **Integrity:** ❌

* **Stability:** ✅✅

* **Truth Debt:** MAX

* **Lucidity:** ❌

*“The lake looks beautiful today.”*

The FEELZ wheel unlocks a new mask:

🎭 **THE SMOOTHER**  
 *(Bonuses to Stability. Lies cost less. Truth hurts more.)*

# ***🎯 FEELZ DARTBOARD — DESIGNER / ENGINEERING SPEC***

---

## ***1\. CORE CONCEPT (SYSTEM SUMMARY)***

*Each FEELZ choice \= **a dart thrown at an emotional board**.*

*The game tracks:*

* ***Which emotional zone** was hit*

* ***How strongly***

* ***Whether it was used with truth or deception***

*At the end of each scene:*

* *A **triadic emotional position** is calculated*

* *That position is logged*

* *The world state subtly shifts*

*At the end of the game:*

* *All scene positions are averaged*

* *Truth Debt modifies the result*

* *An ending is selected*

---

# ***2\. DATA DEFINITIONS***

---

## ***2.1 Emotional Zones***

*`enum EmotionalZone {`*

  *`CONTROL,`*

  *`CONNECTION,`*

  *`COMFORT`*

*`}`*

---

## ***2.2 FEELZ → Zone Mapping***

*`FEELZ_MAP = {`*

  *`Anger:        { zone: CONTROL,    weight: 2 },`*

  *`Fear:         { zone: CONTROL,    weight: 1 },`*

  *`Disgust:      { zone: CONTROL,    weight: 2 },`*

  *`Sadness:      { zone: CONNECTION, weight: 2 },`*

  *`Trust:        { zone: CONNECTION, weight: 1 },`*

  *`Anticipation: { zone: CONNECTION, weight: 1 },`*

  *`Happiness:    { zone: COMFORT,    weight: 2 },`*

  *`Surprise:     { zone: COMFORT,    weight: 1 }`*

*`}`*

*⚠️ Weight reflects emotional intensity, not morality.*

---

## ***3\. SCENE-LEVEL TRACKING***

*Each scene initializes a fresh emotional accumulator.*

*`SceneEmotionState = {`*

  *`control: 0,`*

  *`connection: 0,`*

  *`comfort: 0`*

*`}`*

---

## ***4\. DART THROW LOGIC (FEELZ SELECTION)***

*When player selects a FEELZ:*

*`function applyEmotion(feelz):`*

    *`zone = FEELZ_MAP[feelz].zone`*

    *`weight = FEELZ_MAP[feelz].weight`*

    *`SceneEmotionState[zone] += weight`*

---

## ***5\. SWIPE MODIFIER (TRUTH vs LIE)***

*After the emotional choice, the swipe modifies the emotional result.*

*`function applySwipeModifier(swipeType):`*

    *`if swipeType == "TRUTH":`*

        *`SceneEmotionState.connection += 1`*

        *`SceneEmotionState.comfort -= 1`*

    *`else if swipeType == "LIE":`*

        *`SceneEmotionState.comfort += 1`*

        *`SceneEmotionState.connection -= 1`*

        *`TruthDebt += random(1, 5)`*

*This ensures:*

* *Truth pushes toward vulnerability*

* *Lies push toward emotional insulation*

---

## ***6\. END OF SCENE: TRIAD CALCULATION***

*At scene end:*

*`function resolveScene():`*

    *`total = control + connection + comfort`*

    *`normalized = {`*

        *`control: control / total,`*

        *`connection: connection / total,`*

        *`comfort: comfort / total`*

    *`}`*

    *`SceneResult = normalized`*

    *`save(SceneResult)`*

*This produces a **triadic position** like:*

*`Control:    0.45`*

*`Connection: 0.20`*

*`Comfort:    0.35`*

---

## ***7\. SCENE MARKER (PLAYER FEEDBACK)***

*Based on dominant value:*

*`if control > connection and control > comfort:`*

    *`marker = "Control-Leaning"`*

*`elif connection > control and connection > comfort:`*

    *`marker = "Connection-Leaning"`*

*`else:`*

    *`marker = "Comfort-Leaning"`*

*Displayed as:*

* *UI ripple*

* *Lake visual change*

* *Short text line*

*Example:*

*“The water shifts uneasily.”*

---

## ***8\. ENDGAME AGGREGATION***

*At game end:*

*`FinalEmotion = average(all SceneResults)`*

*Then apply Truth Debt modifier:*

*`if TruthDebt >= 9:`*

    *`Ending = LIVING_LIE`*

*`elif TruthDebt >= 6:`*

    *`Ending = COLLAPSE`*

*`elif TruthDebt >= 3:`*

    *`Ending = FUNCTIONAL_MASK`*

*`else:`*

    *`Ending = CLEAN_CUT`*

*Emotion profile modifies flavor of ending:*

| *Dominant Emotion* | *Ending Flavor* |
| ----- | ----- |
| *Control* | *Violent / Authoritarian* |
| *Connection* | *Melancholic / Reflective* |
| *Comfort* | *Glossy / Artificial* |

---

## ***9\. WHY THIS SYSTEM WORKS***

*✔ Simple math*  
 *✔ No visible meters*  
 *✔ FEELZ choices always matter*  
 *✔ Encourages role-play over optimization*  
 *✔ Supports replayability*  
 *✔ Scales easily with new emotions*

---

## ***10\. OPTIONAL EXTENSIONS (SAFE TO ADD LATER)***

* *🎭 Masks modify emotion weights*

* *🌊 Lake visuals lerp toward dominant emotion*

* *🧠 NPCs bias dialogue based on player’s dominant zone*

* *🔁 New Game+ starts with inherited emotional bias*

[image1]: <data:image/png;base64,>
